An '''attitude thruster''' was a type of small thruster that was installed on all [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. Small compared to a vessel's main [[Sublight engine/Legends|sublight drive]], these [[Engine/Legends|engines]] were used to maneuver a ship within [[Realspace/Legends|realspace]], providing attitude adjustments as required.

[[Space mine/Legends|Space mines]] such as the [[Mark III Merr-Sonn Defender Ion Mine]] were equipped with a single attitude thruster at the base of the weapon.<ref name="EGWT">''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref>

{{Tech-stub}}
